title: Surgeon Vacancy at Torrent Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Torrent Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals!
